prompt: You have 8 apples and pick 5 more. How many apples in all?
There are 12 cookies on a tray. You eat 4. How many cookies are left?
You buy a coffee for $3 and a muffin for $4. How much do you spend in all?
You read 9 pages in the morning and 6 pages at night. How many pages in all?
A carton holds 12 eggs. You use 5 to bake. How many eggs are left?
You walk 7 blocks to the park and 7 blocks home. How many blocks did you walk?
There are 15 birds on a wire. 6 of them fly away. How many birds are left?
You have $10 and spend $4 on a loaf of bread. How much money is left?
You water 6 plants, then water 8 more. How many plants did you water?
A pot of soup serves 10. 3 people sit down to eat. How many servings are left?
